violations.description: General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary. Observed food employee change gloves after cracking shelled eggs, but he did not wash his hands before putting on a new pair. Hands should be washed before putting on gloves.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. Wet wiping cloths found stored on counter between uses. Wiping cloths should be stored in a sanitizing solution or laundered between uses.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. To-go containers were found stored on the floor in the storage area. Single use items should be stored off of the floor.
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Available, knowledgeable, certified manager (4 pts deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Cooking and reheating to the proper time and temperature (5 pts deducted)
